description: The raw data does not include wall-clock timings or GPU logs. To resolve this, next computation should record execution time, per-GPU utilization logs, and scripts for reproducibility including a randomized verification step against an independent checker.
action_taken: The raw data does not include wall-clock timings or GPU logs. To resolve this, next computation should record execution time, per-GPU utilization logs, and scripts for reproducibility including a randomized verification step against an independent checker.
